title: Fix duplicate dependencies field in package.json
Fix circular extends in tsconfig.json
description: The tsconfig.json file in packages/web/ extends './tsconfig.json' which creates a circular reference. Should extend the monorepo base tsconfig (likely ../tsconfig.base.json or ../../tsconfig.base.json).

title: Fix duplicate dependencies in package.json
description: The package.json file in packages/web/ has duplicate 'dependencies' fields (lines 16-20 and 21-23). This causes invalid JSON and prevents package installation. Should merge the dependencies into a single 'dependencies' field.

title: Fix TypeScript errors: add nvidia, kilo, openrouter to Provider and Upstreams types
description: Fixed: Added strictUrlForwarding to ProxyConfig interface in types.ts. Docker build should now succeed.
notes: Blocked by: contextio-a3m (debug output for header detection)

title: Fix incorrect default URLs for NVIDIA and OpenRouter in config.ts
Debug contextio container not routing to NVIDIA API with x-target-url header
description:
The fix for mitm_addon.py has been implemented and deployed. 

The user's issue is with Docker container usage, not CLI mitmproxy. For Docker container with NVIDIA API:

**Solution 1: Use UPSTREAM_OPENAI_URL environment variable**

The command 'docker' could not be found in this WSL 2 distro.
We recommend to activate the WSL integration in Docker Desktop settings.

For details about using Docker Desktop with WSL 2, visit:

https://docs.docker.com/go/wsl2/

**Solution 2: Use x-target-url header with target override**

The command 'docker' could not be found in this WSL 2 distro.
We recommend to activate the WSL integration in Docker Desktop settings.

For details about using Docker Desktop with WSL 2, visit:

https://docs.docker.com/go/wsl2/
Then configure the client to send  header with the NVIDIA API URL.

The mitm_addon.py fix applies to CLI tools that use HTTPS_PROXY (Codex, OpenCode, Copilot CLI), not Docker container usage.

title: Remove deprecated experimental.appDir from next.config.js
description: The next.config.js file contains 'experimental: { appDir: true }' which is deprecated in Next.js 13+ as the app router is now stable. This setting should be removed to avoid warnings and ensure compatibility with future Next.js versions.

title: Update Tailwind CSS configuration for v4
description:
The tailwind.config.js file uses Tailwind v3 format (content array) but the project has tailwindcss@^4.1.0 installed. Tailwind v4 requires a different configuration format.

Need to update tailwind.config.js to be compatible with Tailwind CSS v4, which may involve:
- Removing the content array (v4 uses content paths in package.json or separate config)
- Checking if any other v3-specific settings need updating

Refer to Tailwind v4 migration guide for proper configuration.

title: Replace hardcoded API URL with environment variable
description:
Multiple files use hardcoded 'http://localhost:4040' for API calls:
- packages/web/app/sessions/page.tsx line 14
- packages/web/app/sessions/[id]/page.tsx line 18

Should use process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL with a fallback to 'http://localhost:4040' for development.

Example:
const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:4040'

Then use  in fetch calls.

title: Fix circular extends in tsconfig.json
Remove deprecated experimental.appDir from next.config.js
Update tailwind.config.js for Tailwind CSS v4
Create missing lib/utils.ts with cn and formatDate utilities
description:
The lib/utils.ts file is imported in header.tsx, sessions/page.tsx, and sessions/[id]/page.tsx but does not exist. Need to create this file with:
1. A 'cn' utility function for merging Tailwind classes (similar to tailwind-merge)
2. A 'formatDate' function that takes an ISO timestamp string and returns a formatted date string

File should be created at packages/web/lib/utils.ts

title: Web UI: Create web interface project structure and foundation
description:
Set up the web interface project with Next.js or similar framework. Create the basic directory structure, configure TypeScript, ESLint, and Tailwind CSS. Establish the layout components and routing structure. Ensure the project can run standalone and connect to the Docker container's API endpoints.

title: Fix undefined targetUrl for unknown provider
Run final validation and code review
Add STRICT_URL_FORWARDING check to classifyRequest in routing.ts
Add loading and error states to data fetching in sessions pages
description:
The sessions page files (sessions/page.tsx and sessions/[id]/page.tsx) make fetch requests without handling loading or error states properly. This results in poor user experience when data is loading or when errors occur.

Should implement:
1. Loading states (skeleton UI or spinners) while data is fetching
2. Error states to display when fetch fails
3. Consider using React's useState and useEffect or React Query/SWR for better data fetching

Low-medium priority UX improvement.

title: Remove duplicate entries from .gitignore
description:
The .gitignore file contains duplicate entries:
- .next appears on lines 1 and 5

This creates unnecessary duplication and should be cleaned up by removing the duplicate line.

title: Add loading and error states to data fetching
description:
Data fetching functions in sessions page components lack proper loading and error states:
1. In sessions/page.tsx: getSessions() returns empty array on error without setting error state
2. In sessions/[id]/page.tsx: getSession() throws error without error UI

Should implement:
- Loading states while fetching data
- Error states to show user-friendly messages
- Retry mechanisms if appropriate

Use React useState and useEffect or React Server Components with async/await and proper error handling.

title: Remove duplicate entries from .gitignore
description:
The .gitignore file has duplicate entries:
- .next appears twice (lines 1 and 5)
- This causes unnecessary duplication and should be cleaned up.

Current:
.next
out
node_modules
pnpm-lock.yaml
.next
.eslintrc.json

Should be:
.next
out
node_modules
pnpm-lock.yaml
.eslintrc.json

title: Web UI: Implement metrics dashboard for traffic and usage monitoring
description:
Build a metrics dashboard that displays real-time and historical data on traffic input/output, context usage per provider, and redaction counts. Create charts/graphs using a library like Chart.js or Recharts. Implement metrics collection endpoint that parses capture logs to extract statistics. Add time range selectors and metric refresh controls. Include summary cards for key metrics and detailed breakdowns.

Add load/save functionality to read from and write to the container's mounted policy file. Include preset templates for common redaction configurations. Add export/import capability for policy files.

Implement a searchable, filterable table view with copy-to-clipboard functionality for individual values. Add export to JSON/CSV capability. Include real-time refresh option.

title: Fix NVIDIA API path normalization - add /v1/ prefix for chat/completions endpoints
description: Kilocode sends /chat/completions but NVIDIA API requires /v1/chat/completions. Need to normalize the path in resolveTargetUrl for NVIDIA provider.

comments.author: Russell Powell
comments.text: Code review APPROVED. Fix verified working - path normalization correctly adds /v1/ prefix for NVIDIA API endpoints.

title: Add debug output for header detection in contextio container
description: When the contextio container identifies an unknown provider but the x-nvidia-baseurl header is defined, we need to: (1) output what headers are being detected to the container terminal for debugging, and (2) add more comprehensive output to the container terminal to determine what is happening with provider identification.
notes: Code review APPROVED - fixed TypeError for undefined targetUrl, added null check and tests

title: Add and correct test cases for strictUrlForwarding=true behavior (header overrides should be ignored)
description: Missing test cases for strictUrlForwarding=true where header overrides should be ignored (e.g., with x-nvidia-baseurl header but path indicating OpenAI). Existing tests for strictUrlForwarding=true (lines 185-213 in packages/core/test/routing.test.ts) incorrectly expect header to be honored; they should be updated to reflect path-based classification when strictUrlForwarding=true. Need to add test cases that verify headers are ignored and classification falls back to path-based detection (e.g., expecting openai for /v1/chat/completions). Before completing this bead, you MUST invoke the beads-code-reviewer sub-agent. You must continue fixing issues and re-invoking the beads-code-reviewer until the response is exactly: APPROVED.

title: Add missing default upstreams (openai, anthropic, gemini, chatgpt, vertex) to config.ts
Fix Kilo test with empty headers - provider detection requires x-kilo-baseurl
Fix OpenRouter test with empty headers - provider detection requires x-openrouter-baseurl
Fix test expectations in routing.test.ts
Use shared Session type from types/api.ts instead of duplicating interface
description:
The sessions/[id]/page.tsx file defines a SessionDetail interface (lines 4-15) that duplicates much of the Session type already defined in types/api.ts (lines 1-16). This creates maintenance overhead and potential inconsistencies.

Should import and use the Session type from '@/types/api' instead of defining a local interface.

If additional fields are needed, consider extending the base Session type or using only the fields needed with TypeScript utility types.

Low priority code quality improvement.

title: Consider implementing error boundaries for route segments
description:
Consider implementing error boundaries for route segments to gracefully handle runtime errors in nested routes. This would improve user experience by showing fallback UI instead of crashing the entire route when errors occur.

Could implement:
- app/error.js for global error boundary
- Segment-level error boundaries where appropriate

Low priority enhancement.

title: Use shared Session type from types/api.ts instead of duplicating interface
description:
The sessions/[id]/page.tsx file defines a SessionDetail interface that duplicates and slightly differs from the Session type already defined in types/api.ts. This creates inconsistency and maintenance burden.

Should import and use the Session type from '@/types/api' instead of defining a local SessionDetail interface.

If additional fields are needed, consider extending the base Session type or updating the shared type if appropriate for all uses.

Low priority code quality improvement.

title: Consider adding error boundaries for route segments
description:
Consider implementing error boundaries for route segments to gracefully handle runtime errors in nested routes. This would improve user experience by showing fallback UI instead of crashing the entire route.

Could implement:
- app/error.js for global error boundary
- Segment-level error boundaries where appropriate

Low priority enhancement.
